message:
fix(scripts): move zero-placeholder-scan rch target dir from /tmp to repo-local path

Change the default CARGO_TARGET_DIR for the zero-placeholder-scan gate
from /tmp/rch_target_rgc_zero_placeholder_scan_... to
${root_dir}/target_rch_rgc_zero_placeholder_scan_... so the remote cargo
target directory lives under the repo root, consistent with other gate
scripts. Add test helpers repo_root() and read_repo_text(), and a test
asserting the gate script uses the repo-local path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
